question: Is the abetment done in India?

yes.question: Is the act abetted committed in consequence of the abetment?

yes.name: Punishment of abetment if act abetted is committed in consequence and where no express provision is made for its punishment

no.name: Punishment of abetment if person abetted does act with different intention from that of abettor

no.question: Is the abetment done outside India?

yes.question: Is the act abetted committed in India?

yes.name: Abetment in India of offences outside India

no.name: Abetment outside India for offence in India
